title: Bulk import returns 500 intermittently
body: Customer's nightly bulk-import job sees ~3% 500s. Worse during EU peak.

title: SOC 2 report request
body: Send latest SOC 2 Type II report.

title: Dashboard regression after April release
body: Filters not persisting between page loads.

title: Q2 QBR feedback
body: Positive overall; asked about roadmap for SSO across the orgs.
